about: This group is for ALL interests. We host Lifestyle parties in our private home 2-3 times per month in the Fall, Winter & Spring, and every weekend in the Summer. You meet new people safely and comfortably to pursue their particular interests while meeting open and like-minded adults. All of our parties prioritize the safety and comfort of everyone attending and we take extra care to make sure that there is absolutely no shady, disrespectful or creepy behavior at our events. Rules include no weapons, no illegal drugs (420 friendly), BYOB with mixers and snacks provided, and no body shaming.

Welcome to Club Encounters, an on-premises Social Club for the Alternative Lifestyle. We are a no membership, no reservation night club / social club that caters to the alternative lifestyle. Our main floor features a lighted dance floor with DJ, 2 video lounges and a pool table. Don't miss our secluded mirror Jacuzzi Room complete with shower room and lockers and out back we have our smoking patio. Need refreshments? Visit our juice and snack bar on the main floor. Upstairs you can get passionate in one of our six playrooms, one of which features a swing. Whenever you want to let your passion run wild, Club Encounters is your room to play!

For nearly two decades, MySecretHouse has been a place where interesting people gather for evenings that feel a little different from ordinary life. Imagine a beautiful private home filled with laughter, music, and the quiet excitement of meeting new people who share a sense of curiosity and adventure. Guests drift between the kitchen, the patio, and the pool, conversations spark easily, and the atmosphere carries just the right mix of elegance and playful anticipation. These gatherings have always been about creating an environment where adults can relax, connect, and enjoy themselves among like-minded company. We have hosted over 600 events with more than 25,000 people since 2006, creating memories and friendships that will last a lifetime.

about: Throwing the hottest parties in all of AZ! about: The Tri-State Swingers is a dynamic community of adventurous couples which started in the Tri-State area of California, Nevada and Arizona, but has expanded to now include Utah, Colorado and New Mexico. about: Club VIXXXINS is a Members Only Private Club based out of Phoenix, AZ offering themed exclusive lifestyle and kink events, underground and eclectic gala venues, upscale themed house parties, exclusive dinner parties, and meet and greets.
